---
title: "Glossary"
---

A growing list of key ESS terms. Keep definitions short and consistent. (The
search box in the top bar searches this page too.)

| Term | Definition | Topic |
|------|------------|-------|
| Environmental value system (EVS) | A worldview shaping how an individual or group perceives and acts on the environment. | 1.1 |
| Sustainability | Use of resources at a rate that allows natural regeneration and avoids long-term damage. | 1.3 |
| Natural capital | Natural resources that produce a flow of goods or services over time. | 1.3 |
| Carrying capacity | The maximum population an environment can support indefinitely. | 2.1 |
| Biodiversity | The variety of life: genetic, species, and habitat diversity. | 3.1 |

*Add a row whenever you introduce a new term on a topic page.*
